title: Christmas Tree Ribbon, 26cm X 10 Yards Mesh Ribbon Christmas, Metallic Foil Mesh Fabric for Xmas Trees, Garlands, Weddings and Winter Parties
features: Christmas Mesh Ribbon: This Christmas tree ribbon is approximately 26 cm wide and 10 yards (9.1 meters) long, making it ample enough for large holiday decorations, perfect for your creative and diverse holiday ambiance

Mesh Material: Made from high-quality plastic mesh, the Christmas mesh ribbon is soft to the touch, easy to tie and shape, and resistant to tearing and deformation. It's reusable and easy to use for years to come

Creative DIY: The Christmas ribbon can be cut into various lengths and shapes to suit your needs, making it perfect for crafts like bows, bouquets, and decorative balls. Unleash your creative side and create unique holiday decorations

Christmas Decorations: Christmas ribbon is perfect for decorating Christmas trees, wreaths, and gift boxes. It can also be used to embellish stair railings, doorframes, archways, and other spaces, creating a warm Christmas atmosphere

Ideal Gift: This ribbon is not only a great decoration, but also a thoughtful gift for friends and family. Whether it's a gift for family, friends, or a reward for your hard work, it brings a festive sense of ritual and warm memories
